commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Annual Budget tool (1-year P&L with monthly breakdown)

- Sales forecast, direct costs, overheads by category
- Monthly P&L table with FY totals and % of revenue
- KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Profit, Overheads, EBITDA
- 4 charts: Revenue vs Costs, Monthly EBITDA, Overhead breakdown, Cumulative EBITDA
- Excel template download + upload
- PDF export with branded report

Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

justify-end pb-8: single word sits at screen bottom, subsequent
words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Nuevas páginas:

  3 modalidades detalladas y FAQ accordion
- comparador.html: comparador de hasta 3 modelos con tabla lado a lado,
  datos de 31 modelos (m², dorms, baños, precio, estilo)

Navegación:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[DOCS] Session 94 — Restructure CV_PIPELINE_PLAN.md + lock Planning Addendum (#713)

* [FEAT] #673 Jersey OCR validation script — GO/NO-GO gate for identity cascade

Runs EasyOCR on YOLO-detected player crops from all 5 cameras
(Tight, AwayOZone, HomeOZone, AwayGoalie, HomeGoalie).

Results:
- Tight: 2% readable (FAIL)
- AwayOZone: 4% (FAIL)
- HomeOZone: 0% (FAIL)
- AwayGoalie: 12% (MARGINAL — likely false positives)
- HomeGoalie: 0% (FAIL)

Verdict: OCR is NOT viable with current GoPro camera setup.
All reads are single digits (0,4,5,6,9) — likely false positives from
logos/equipment, not actual jersey numbers.

Path forward: Event anchoring from tracker data replaces OCR as the
identity lock mechanism in the cascade.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v4.2.0: Silent auto-update with progress bar

- NSIS oneClick for silent install (no wizard on update)
- quitAndInstall(true, true) for immediate restart
- Progress bar in titlebar during download
- Three states: preparing → downloading X% → install button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

show swipe: bias towards english-language content (#77)

* Full codebase refactor: shared layout, dedup, security, a11y, SEO, perf

Architecture:
- BaseLayout.astro: shared HTML boilerplate for all 12 pages (meta, OG, fonts, JSON-LD)
- sportsCore.ts: shared ESPN types, ranking helpers, fetch loop, DOM utils
- sports.css: shared structural CSS for NBA Now + MLB GameRank

Code quality:
- Remove 1,451 lines of duplication, add 607 lines of shared infrastructure
- Type mlbGameRank.ts with proper interfaces (was 40+ uses of `any`)
- Delete 7 orphaned screenshot PNGs (~630KB)
- Remove dead code: unused .glass CSS, .broadcast-badge.local, screenshot fields

Security:
- Fix XSS in nearest-coffee/fun renderError() — escape title/message params
- Add JSON.parse error handling in recommend.ts (502 for malformed AI response)
- Wrap localStorage.setItem in try/catch in idea-shuffler (private browsing)

Accessibility:
- Add noscript fallback for homepage card visibility
- Add role="img" + aria-label to pixel-aquarium canvas
- Add aria-hidden to decorative SVG icons
- Add prefers-reduced-motion to nba-now, mlb-gamerank, idea-shuffler

SEO:
- Add robots.txt with sitemap reference
- Install @astrojs/sitemap for auto-generated sitemap.xml
- Complete manifest.json with proper PWA fields

Performance:
- Skip ESPN polling when tab is hidden (Page Visibility API)
- Skip pixel-aquarium game loop when tab is hidden
- Cache DOM element references in pixel-aquarium (was getElementById per frame)

Add premium UI, Tinder swipe cards, and "I Ate Bad" recovery feature

Premium UI overhaul: champagne gold (#D4AF6A), animated gradient header,
pill glow with ripple effects, spring physics on all overlays, floating
decide card animation, and result slide-up transitions.

Tinder-style swipe cards on all food suggestions — decision flow results
and quick filter results now show swipeable cards (left = next option,
right = accept). Counter, dots, and hint text guide the interaction.

swipeable food suggestion cards with rotating coach lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement all 17 Eagle Mode stroke end types

Replace the invented 16-variant StrokeEnd enum with Eagle Mode's actual
types: Butt, Cap, Arrow, ContourArrow, LineArrow, Triangle,
ContourTriangle, Square, ContourSquare, HalfSquare, Circle,
ContourCircle, HalfCircle, Diamond, ContourDiamond, HalfDiamond, Stroke.

StrokeEnd is now a struct with end_type, inner_color, width_factor, and
length_factor fields. The painter renders all 17 types via
paint_stroke_end() and shortens line bodies with cut_line_at_end() so
decorations don't overlap the stroke.

fix: release memory budget when pod is not found

noticed the pod was gone but never released the memory budget, causing
subsequent pod creation to fail with "insufficient global memory".

commit.message:
Fix iOS resume: restart download when background task dies on simulator

When the app is killed on simulator, URLSession background tasks don't
survive. The persisted URL mapping still exists, so register() detects
a "resuming" state but no actual download stream is available. Now we
fall back to restarting the download transparently instead of hanging.

commit.message:
feat: full MUGEN support — parsers, state machine, combat, game loop integration

Phase 1 — Parsers:
- DEF parser (character definition files)
- CNS parser with all controller types (HitDef, VelSet/Add, PosAdd/Set, VarSet/Add,
  ChangeState, ChangeAnim, PlaySnd, AssertSpecial, Gravity, NotHitBy, HitBy, VarRandom)
- CMD parser with full motion input support (QCF/QCB/DP/HCF/HCB, modifiers ~/$/ +)
- ACT palette parser, SND parser
- parse_statedefs_only() for partial CNS parsing (no header sections required)

Phase 2 — State machine:
- StateType enum replaced with state_num:i32 + state_frame:i32 (MUGEN-compatible)
- Trigger AST parser + full evaluator (32+ trigger types, operators, ifelse/floor/abs/var)
- statetype trigger support (S/C/A/L constants = 0/1/2/3)
- MugenFighterState: vars[60], ctrl, rng_state, hitstun, anim tracking, pending_sounds
- Command recognizer: facing-aware F/B mapping, time window enforcement (18 tests)
- mugen_tick() / mugen_tick_with_p2(): statedef -1 first, then current state
- common1.cns loaded at runtime; fallback built-in states when file absent

Phase 3 — Combat:
- HitDef with 26 fields; NotHitBy/HitBy invincibility windows
- mugen_hitdef_collision(): Clsn1 vs Clsn2 with distance-based fallback
- Combo scaling 100/100/80/70/60/50%; hitstun/blockstun timers
- P2 trigger variables (p2stateno, p2life, p2bodydist, etc.)
- FighterSnapshot extended with MugenState for full rollback support
- Rollback determinism test: 60-frame simulate, save at 30, restore, re-simulate, assert identical

Game loop integration:
- game/src/main.rs fully rewritten to use MUGEN state machine
- MUGEN coordinate fix: -y=up; ground clamp, friction, and render y all corrected
- Velocity integration (pos += vel) added to logic_update
- Animation element advancement (advance_anim_elem) using AIR frame durations with looping
- Fallback common states inject statedef -1 global controllers when character has none
- State 50 (air stand) and 52 (landing) provided in fallback for Kyo's jump flow

fix(stripe): use 'tier' metadata key instead of 'plan'

The app's verify-marketing-payment endpoint reads metadata.tier

writing metadata.plan, causing the app to not detect the
pre-selected tier — showing the service tier step again and
double-charging the customer.

commit.message:
Windows fixes: path separators, config location, service DACL, find-admin

- Normalise backslash→forward-slash in indexed paths on Windows only
  (backslash is valid in Linux filenames so replacement is #[cfg(windows)])
- Default config path on Windows: %USERPROFILE%\.config\FindAnything\client.toml
  (previously fell through to HOME giving wrong case and wrong dir)
- Tray app default config path updated to match
- Windows installer writes config to %USERPROFILE%\.config\FindAnything\
  and passes that path to find-watch install
- scan-and-start.bat uses %USERPROFILE%\.config\FindAnything\client.toml
- Service DACL: grant BUILTIN\Users start/stop/query rights during install
  so tray app can toggle the watcher without Administrator privileges
- Add find-admin.exe to Windows installer [Files] section
- install-server.sh: recommend 'user' mode prominently, warn about
  home-dir access limitation of 'system' mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use Claude to intelligently reformat content on layout remix

Replace rule-based field extraction with an AI call to /api/ai-remix.
Claude receives the full source slide and target layout type, then
restructures all existing content to fit the new layout schema — preserving
headlines, body copy, bullet points, metrics, images, attributions, etc.

Falls back to the rule-based remixToType() on network error. Uses
claude-haiku for low latency. Shows a "✦ AI… / Remixing…" loading state
on the clicked thumbnail while the request is in flight.
